title: rubus nivalis
intro: Rubus nivalis, also known as Snowberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rubus nivalis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Snowberry include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus nivalis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically in the form of salves or creams to harness its medicinal properties.
